sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْقَلَمُ رَفِيقَ الْكَاتِبِ فِي كُلِّ وَقْتٍ وَكُلِّ مَكَانٍ.
sentences.translation: Pero je bilo pisčev drug u svako doba i na svakom mjestu.
sentences.translationEn: The pen was the writer's companion at all times and in all places.

sentences.arabic: حَمَلَهُ مَعَهُ فِي السَّفَرِ وَفِي الْبَيْتِ وَفِي لَحَظَاتِ الْفَرَحِ وَالْحُزْنِ.
sentences.translation: Nosio ga je sa sobom na putovanjima i kod kuće, u trenucima radosti i tuge.
sentences.translationEn: He carried it with him on travels and at home, in moments of joy and sorrow.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ بِهِ قِصَصًا عَنِ النَّاسِ الَّذِينَ قَابَلَهُمْ وَالأَمَاكِنِ الَّتِي زَارَهَا.
sentences.translation: Njime je pisao priče o ljudima koje je sreo i mjestima koja je posjetio.
sentences.translationEn: With it he wrote stories about the people he had met and the places he had visited.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ ضَاعَ قَلَمُهُ يَوْمًا، شَعَرَ كَأَنَّهُ فَقَدَ صَدِيقًا قَدِيمًا.
sentences.translation: Kad je jednog dana izgubio pero, osjetio je kao da je izgubio starog prijatelja.
sentences.translationEn: The day he lost his pen, he felt as though he had lost an old friend.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ: «الْقَلَمُ لَيْسَ أَدَاةً، بَلْ هُوَ جُزْءٌ مِنِّي لَا أَسْتَطِيعُ الْعَيْشَ بِدُونِهِ.»
sentences.translation: Rekao je: „Pero nije alat — ono je dio mene bez kojeg ne mogu živjeti."
sentences.translationEn: He said: "A pen is not a tool — it is a part of me that I cannot live without."
